title: Ecto.Enum for status field
prompt: Replace the stringly-typed `:status` field in MyApp.Tasks.Task (test_fixtures/stringly_typed_status.ex) with an Ecto.Enum of values [:pending, :in_progress, :done, :cancelled]. Also replace `:priority` with Ecto.Enum of [:low, :medium, :high]. Remove the now-redundant validate_inclusion calls. Write to lib/my_app/tasks/task.ex.
tier_rationale: Single field-type upgrade. Easy but shows the idiomatic Elixir preference for compile-time-safe enums.
